media/audio/1e/1e39fc80501b2b9f.m4a.text: Hey, just checking in — wanted to see if you got home safe. Call me back when you can.

media/audio/1e/1ee15083deab746f.m4a.text: Quick heads up, the meeting tomorrow has moved to 3pm. Same room, just an hour later. See you there.

media/audio/5a/5a49b828a5de75ac.m4a.text: I'm at the grocery store. Do we need bread? Let me know in the next five minutes or so.

media/audio/72/72a1003cccb7dcef.m4a.text: Just landed. Going to grab my bag and head to the hotel. Will text when I'm there.

media/audio/78/78195ee9453c3a3e.m4a.text: Forgot to mention — the dog needs his medicine at six. It's on the kitchen counter.

media/audio/95/958a0764004968ce.m4a.text: Listening to the podcast you sent. It's really good, you were right. Thanks for the recommendation.
